mapper.sql: id, trade_date, industry_code, industry_name, industry_link, net_amount, inflow_amount, outflow_amount, industry_change_pct, leading_stock, leading_stock_code, leading_stock_link, leading_stock_pct, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO industry_capital_flow (trade_date, industry_code, industry_name, industry_link, net_amount, inflow_amount, outflow_amount, industry_change_pct, leading_stock, leading_stock_code, leading_stock_link, leading_stock_pct) VALUES
(#{item.tradeDate}, #{item.industryCode}, #{item.industryName}, #{item.industryLink}, #{item.netAmount}, #{item.inflowAmount}, #{item.outflowAmount}, #{item.industryChangePct}, #{item.leadingStock}, #{item.leadingStockCode}, #{item.leadingStockLink}, #{item.leadingStockPct})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE industry_code = VALUES(industry_code), industry_link = VALUES(industry_link), net_amount = VALUES(net_amount), inflow_amount = VALUES(inflow_amount), outflow_amount = VALUES(outflow_amount), industry_change_pct = VALUES(industry_change_pct), leading_stock = VALUES(leading_stock), leading_stock_code = VALUES(leading_stock_code), leading_stock_link = VALUES(leading_stock_link), leading_stock_pct = VALUES(leading_stock_pct), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT FROM industry_capital_flow WHERE trade_date = #{tradeDate} ORDER BY net_amount DESC
